feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Duplication in component tab of maintenance order while adding one component
entry.content:
Hi All

While creating maintenance order in component tab, when I enter one component, its automatically duplicated with the same item number.

But in reservation number it is showing only one item. Can anyone guide how to remove this duplication?

Regards,

Hammad

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: Vaildation at maintenance item & maintenance plan level
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I need to restrict user to use equipment task list  at maintenance item other than the equipment task list used as reference object at maintenance item . Suppose Equipment 'AAAA' is used as reference object at maintenance item , system should restrict to use task list of another equipment say BBBBB. Which user exit or BADI I can use for this ?

Thanking you .

Mohammed

entry.title: How can I setup a Maintenance Strategy to repeat cycle? 1M, 2M, 3M, 1M, 2M, 3M, 1M, 2M, 3M
entry.content:
Just like the title says, I am trying to setup a Maintenance Strategy to repeat a cycle; 1M, 2M, 3M, 1M, 2M, 3M, 1M, 2M, 3M.

When I setup a Maintenance Strategy with 1M, 2M, 3M packages and a hierarchy of 1,2,3, SAP repeats based on the highest multiple of the interval. 1M, 2M, 3M, 2M, 1M, 3M, 1M, 2M, 3M, 2M, 1M, 3M

I have tried many iterations of different packages (duplicate packages with different hierarchies, extending to a full year and checking multiples, etc) and I just cannot seem to get this to work.

Any suggestion are welcome!

entry.title: Error : Date 7983 cannot be converted (please correct)
entry.content:
Hello Sir/ Madam,

 In system patches are updated after problem generated. When sales order created in transaction code VA01 some material shown error " Date 7983 cannot be converted (please correct)" .  So please give solution for this problem.

 Thanks

entry.title: How can a many Cancel the assignment Maintenance Item Of Maintenance Plan ?
entry.content:
Hi

Dear experts.

I need to a many Cancel the assignment Maintenance Item Of Maintenance Plan, and of course I am also familiar with the T-code IP02 that I have to do one by one. I am looking for another way, such as in bulk or LSMW or even introducing BAPI or FM .
Of course, I also tried with LSMW, but the record does not get the item number in T-code ip02, and as a result, the record will not be good.
It cannot be done with IP15 or IP18, etc...

entry.title: How to use caufvd_imp in ZXCN2U03?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i want to use caufvd-auart and caufvd_imp parameter like in ZXWOCU07 in ZXCN2U03 but there i can only use resbd.

Is it possible to check the order type in ZXCN2U03 when entering materials?

 

Regards,

Plamen K.

entry.title: Not able to map confirmation text in IW41 to PDF print
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are using SAP S/4HANA 2021

In IW41 plant maintenance, while doing service order confirmation, confirm.  Text  is showing only 40 characters, we required service order confirmation text at least 5000 characters.

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Material withdrawal checking/Verification prior to work order status change to TECO
entry.content: Is there a way that system can verify or check that material withdrawal has been completed prior to permitting work order status change to TECO.

entry.title: In shift Note getting no Input help implemented for Reference Object BUS1019
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In Shift Note for Work center when we select Reference Object as Maintenance Task List and in the Key field if we go for F4 help we are getting a pop-up "No Input help implemented for Reference Object BUS1019". Can you please help us on this.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Auto generation of preventive maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi All ,

Greetings !

I have been working in SAP Rise version . Is there any standard functionality available to generate preventive maintenance order automatically based on production order confirmation quantity ? If not, how can we accomplish this ? Requirement is that every 500 ton material production, system should generate preventive maintenance order automatically . 

Thanking you .

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: The Purchase requisition created by PM oder not allowing to change the item category to D (Service)
entry.content:
Hello,
I created the PM order with control key PM02 and maintained purchasing data in components screen. The Purchase requisition created by PM order is having item category as blank(Standard). Its not allowing to change to D (Service). 

How to create Service entry sheet for the PREQ/PO in this case?

entry.title: Dear Experts ! i am little confused about one thing. One of the importance of VALID FROm date in Equ
entry.content:
Dear Experts ! i am little confused about one thing.

Equipment Validity is just not only a CREATION date of the technical Object in the system and it also checks that maintenance plan should not be created before the Validity FROM date

Today i have created an equipment with validity from date : 20.10.2024( 20th Oct'24), Now i have created a maintenance plan on the equipment with cycle start date 20.8.2024 (20th Aug'24) and it does not give me any error and allow me to created the Mplan on the same

My question is is there any standard check to refrain Maintenance plan to be created of the Equipment itself has a validity later time

entry.title: Where do I add a new object type to be viewed and added in IE01?Is it related to Class config?
entry.content:
I need to add a new object type which is to be used in IE01, object type field. I am unable to find the configuration of it.

Is it related to class configuration? I tried it in SPRO but I am unable to get to the page where I can add a new object type.

Also, is there a table where I can see the existing object types?

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP Overall Equipment Effectiveness Management PLM Classification SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Equipment Status to INAC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If we update equipment status to INAC will the corresponding asset in FI be also updated with deletion flag or do we need to go for an enhancement.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Split resource option not editable in operation tab of Change Maintenance order app
entry.content:
In Change maintenance order app under operation, I am not able to add resource / split under requirement tab. Field is not editable, but we can be able to perform this action in GUI using IW32. 

Could you please suggest the way to fix the issue. User unable to add resource directly and they need to use IW32 every time to add resource.

entry.title: preventive maintenance plan hierarchical strategies
entry.content:
Hello,

Does the preventive maintenance plan strategy hierarchy works same way in both scenarios:

Scenario 1: Strategy plan has only one item and in task list there is used multiple maintenance packages (example: small inspection every 1YEAR  and big inspection every 5 YEAR)

Scenario 2: Strategy plan has two maintenance items

                                    ITEM 1: small inspection  every 1 YEAR (own task list with 1 year maintenance packet)

                                    ITEM 2: big inspection every 5 YEAR (own task list with 5 year maintenance packet)

Question: Does the higher hierarchy prevent maintenance plan creation (for 1 year) in scenario 2

entry.title: Re: Equipment Status to INAC
entry.content:
Hi Preethialevarthi,

Equipment-Asset synchronization (by standard) can be done only for a predefined set of fields. In the IMG route: Financial Accounting -> Asset Accounting -> Master Data -> Automatic creation of equipment master records -> Assign Master Data fields of Assets and Equipment, you can find the fields that can be mapped.

Before this you have to map asset class with equipment category and give conditions in "Specify conditions for synchronization of Master Date" node.

If you want to synchronize more fields, you have to go with "Develop Enhancement for Field and Class Assignment" IMG node (Customer Enhancement: AAPM0001). It is recommended to only create a synchronization between data fields for which the following is true:

    • The fields are defined syntactically the same. (Not same in the case of INAC eqp. status and deletion of asset)
    • The fields are not primary or foreign keys.

Refer note : 370884 - PM-AA 4.6C: Consulting on sync activation + corrections - SAP for Me

Alternatively:
You can use the BADI: EQUI_UPDATE or User Exit: IEQM0003 to detect equipment status change to INAC (Status type code = 'I0320').

For updating the asset master record, you can use the functional module ASSET_MASTERRECORD_MAINTENANCE. Field for deletion flag: I_ANLA - XSPEB

Hope this answer gave you a brief overview to help your case.

Regards,
Ritesh PR

entry.title: Controlling Fiori EAM Access to technical objects by their category
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We're seeking assistance with restricting user access within the EAMS_WDA_TECHOBJ_OIF FIORI Webdynpro Apps (both "Create technical object" and "Edit technical object"). We need to implement granular control over which types of equipment and functional locations a specific user can create and modify.

Specifically, the user should only be permitted to:

  • Create: Only Equipment of type 'X' using the "Create technical object" app. Creation of other equipment types (e.g., 'Y') and functional locations should be prohibited.

  • Modify: Only Equipment of type 'X' using the "Edit technical object" app. Modification of other equipment types should be prohibited. Furthermore, only functional locations of type 'Z'  should be modifiable. Modifications to other functional location types should be prevented.

We need to understand the best approach to achieve this restriction within the SAP system. Are there specific authorization objects, roles, or configuration settings that would allow us to enforce these precise limitations? If the SAP standard would provide a solution, would there be any suitable BADI or User Exit?Any guidance or best practices on implementing this access control would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Highlight Critical materials in IH01
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to highlight Critical materials in yellow in IH01.  I have looked at BADI_EAM_STRUCTURE_LIST but I can't figure out how to make that work or if it is the correct BADI.  It is used in Form OBJECT_TYPE_COLOR in program RIIFLO10, Include MIHIXF40.  All materials are red and we would like the Critical materials to stand out and be highlighted in yellow. 

Thank you for any suggestions.

entry.title: S4HANA GUI missing insert delete button on Notif DMS
entry.content:
S4HANA GUI notification not showing the insert and delete button. However it is showing on the Fiori app.

S4HANA VS ECC GUI notification- Document tab

Fiori App

Please provide any inputs to correct this issue. Thanks!
